'''ngaguvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachahri|kachahri]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachahri|kachahri]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngaguvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngægivith|ngægivith]] || [[word:ngægivij|ngægivij]] || [[word:ngægivish|ngægivish]] || [[word:ngægivi|ngægivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngaguguvuth|ngaguguvuth]] || [[word:ngaguguvuj|ngaguguvuj]] || [[word:ngaguguvush|ngaguguvush]] || [[word:ngaguguvu|ngaguguvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaguvuth|ngaguvuth]] || [[word:ngaguvuj|ngaguvuj]] || [[word:ngaguvush|ngaguvush]] || [[word:ngaguvu|ngaguvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngagufvuth|ngagufvuth]] || [[word:ngagufvuj|ngagufvuj]] || [[word:ngagufvush|ngagufvush]] || [[word:ngagufvuf|ngagufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngaguvuthu|ngaguvuthu]] || [[word:ngaguvuju|ngaguvuju]] || [[word:ngaguvushu|ngaguvushu]] || [[word:ngaguvuku|ngaguvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngaguvuth|ngaguvuth]] || [[word:ngaguvuj|ngaguvuj]] || [[word:ngaguvush|ngaguvush]] || [[word:ngaguvu|ngaguvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngaguvuthul|ngaguvuthul]] || [[word:ngaguvujul|ngaguvujul]] || [[word:ngaguvushul|ngaguvushul]] || [[word:ngaguvukul|ngaguvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngaguvuthuthu|ngaguvuthuthu]] || [[word:ngaguvujuju|ngaguvujuju]] || [[word:ngaguvushushu|ngaguvushushu]] || [[word:ngaguvuku|ngaguvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngaguvuthun|ngaguvuthun]] || [[word:ngaguvujun|ngaguvujun]] || [[word:ngaguvushun|ngaguvushun]] || [[word:ngaguvukun|ngaguvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngaguvuthuoro|ngaguvuthuoro]] || [[word:ngaguvujuoro|ngaguvujuoro]] || [[word:ngaguvushuoro|ngaguvushuoro]] || [[word:ngaguvukuoro|ngaguvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
